nasb.text: In the porch of the gate were two tables on each side, on which to slaughter the burnt offering, the sin offering and the guilt offering.

esv.text: And in the vestibule of the gate were two tables on either side, on which the burnt offering and the sin offering and the guilt offering were to be slaughtered.

cnv.text: 在門廊裡，這邊有兩張桌子，那邊也有兩張桌子，在上面可以宰殺燔祭牲、贖罪祭牲和贖愆祭牲。

ccb.text: 门廊两边各有两张用来屠宰燔祭牲、赎罪祭牲和赎过祭牲的桌子。
